item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: They're lying to you about solar
item.description: Solar panels wear out not because the material is used up but mostly because the glass changes shape (scratches and clouding and such). You can just melt it down and put it back into the correct shape again. The cleanest source of parts for solar panels are old solar panels. Similar for batteries, the most common source of materials for lead acid batteries is old batteries, it's why you get a discount if you bring your dead one in. The same is true for Lithium ion ones, especially car or grid scale sized ones. (sorry for the potato quality, you can't see community notes without an account so I had to use a repost and couldn't grab a fresh screenshot)
item.dc:creator: meme2zombie

item.title: If You Make A Nostril Sound, You Have To Hit The Green Arrow Thingy. Friday Random Meme Dump #981
item.description:
1. The movie actually got a lot of things right
2. ADICKDID
3. Men are simple creatures
4
5. Imagine the person that led to this messaged being printed on each pizza box
6
7
8. My body is ready
9
10. How the hell does this happen?!
11
12. Accurate
13
14. The academy better be watching this!
15. Thank you for making in at the end of this dump! If you have a minute to spare, I just wanted to show you the latest screenshot for a game I'm making called The Milgram Experiment! I think I have finally achieved photorealism!!! Woo hooo!!! Here is my short pitch for the game "What if PAPERS, PLEASE and SEVERANCE had a baby and that baby tested how evil you are?" Other inspiration include Subliminal and Papers, Please. Oh, also I avoid using any Generative AI in the game. All voice acting is done by real voice actors, no AI art, no AI script, no AI videos! If you are interested, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Favorite and forget.

item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Would You Like to Feel Attacked Today?
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/@ADHD_love Lol. Fuck. Trying to put the link in and deleted the lore drop. Tiny octopus is having one of those days. Anyway, there's lots of us who grew up like this, and out of it all, I'm glad that I learned so I can be more supportive of my neurodivergent kids and support them. Because that's what's important. Making it better for the ones who follow even if we had it rough. Hope you guys are having a great day and have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Israel society is institutionally depraved. They have NO humanity
item.description: There is so little hope for anyone born in Israel. Brainwashed from birth, raised on a 3000 year old fairytale, a school system that teaches racism, conscripted into a murderous army, a political system which, at the minimum espouses apartheid...they raise their children to grow up and be animals
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Same with my Latinos. Love seeing so many backgrounds enjoy Ren fairs
item.dc:creator: Bombaso

item.title: To put anti vaxxers on the school bench.
item.description: Are the medical industry a corrupt hell hole? Yes. Do big pharma profit off the sickness and need of people? Yes. Do they do price gouging. Yes. All of the above. But you know nothing about what it was like living when you got sick and just had to suck it up until you died. Influenza. Total deaths: About 200 million. ... Bubonic plague. Total deaths: At least 200 million. ... Smallpox. Total deaths: Up to 1 billion. ... Tuberculosis. Total deaths: More than 1 billion. ... So for me, this is like a deal with the devil. This is the system we created for ourself. Yeah take some fucking responsibility. We saw this coming and did nothing. This is not an insult to the scientist who spent countless hours figuring out how to keep us safe.
item.dc:creator: Raastifan

item.title: Dump of 20 videos on "how some things are done". Enjoy !
item.description:
Wasp nest removal using gasoline.
Roof tile lift.
Vacuum clamp for solo carpenters.
Easy To Use.
B787 carbon brake change.
How a safe lock works.
Mountainside concrete delivery.
This smooth niche curve ...
Mini concrete mixer.
Steady, steady, almost there ...
Automatic screen printing line.
Embroidery.
More Machine Embroidery.
Fabric wave-arounder.
Fabric cutting machine with automatic blade sharpening.
How a Handmade Powder Brush Is Made.
Looks great.
This is why hand made watches are expensive.
The heart of the Blancpain Villeret Quantième Complet.
[Japan] Unloading a truck, without a truck.

item.title: PTGDump: A Whole Bunch of Nerd Sh*t Again
item.description:
Hello everyone! Have a little Original Galadriel. As a treat.
H N N N G
This is presumably what young Clark searched for.
No mulligans; Draw Ten, Keep 7, 3 go to bottom of deck you sidewinders!
"Captain, a Romulan ship is decloaking." "AAAAUGH!"
You know, I don't think that actually happened.
Some leftovers from my last Simpsonsposting post.
Just more proof that silly nerdy guys pull baddies.
THIS GOES FOR ALL OF YOU.
Body wash/Body wash. Friendly neighborhood Body wash.
Get in the robot, Calvin.
Have some more lemonposting!
Would we describe Sokka as the "intelligent" character?
No, I'm pretty sure it's just Twi'lek and Hutt.
Last one. Creator is Juiceone3, and they do amazing work.
Image is outdated, as June Foray sadly passed away years ago. What a legend. There are also two amazing women who are not pictured, but should be. The first is Sara Berner. Look her up... her voice work is ABSOLUTELY INCREDIBLE. She had an insane career, but is mostly forgotten today. The second is Mae Questel, the original Betty Boop. Look her up too. Although, I'm pretty sure you might know her from her second most famous character: Aunt Bethany from Christmas Vacation. :-)
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
Goodness gracious!
This is so dumb, and I love it so much.
Not familiar with the artist (Cigaradd?), but this is giving Adventure Time vibes.
Thanks for reading everyone! This dump has been brought to you by... ...my gaming channel on the YouTubes! It's growing, and I want to take as many Imgur content creators along with me as I can. If you have a channel you want to promote, be it Twitch, YouTube or otherwise, let me know! Send me a link and I'll promote you in a future dump. And swing by the channel if you have some time to kill, or just need a pleasantly deep voice in the background while you do whatever. I have a special Friday the 13th post up today. youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: This is Natalia, 70. Fleeing from Russian invaders.
item.description: She pushed her injured husband Fedir in a wheelchair for 13 km along the road while fleeing Kostiantynivka in Donetsk Oblast. Russian drones were circling overhead, and the road they were fleeing along was strewn with the bodies of people who had tried to save themselves but couldn’t. But Natalia kept going. She couldn’t stop – her husband was dying and needed urgent surgery. ? ok_ukr and vadim.geiko via Instagram
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.description:
No bigger updates. Just rearranged some patches

item.dc:creator: BjrnGodi

item.title: GovBrief Today #406
item.description: Elected officials last talked about Muslim Americans this way in 2001. Republican members of Congress have spent the last four weeks saying they would choose dogs over Muslims and declaring they don't belong in America. The Speaker of the House called Islam a "misguided religion" to justify the Iran war, then refused to condemn any of it, calling the rhetoric "popular sentiment." Today, a man previously imprisoned for helping ISIS attacked a Virginia ROTC classroom, and another man drove a truck loaded with explosives and a rifle into a Michigan synagogue with 140 children inside. What followed 2001 reshaped America for a generation. Now the rhetoric is running ahead of the violence, not behind it, and it's being road-tested as midterm election talking points during an unpopular war against a Muslim nation. After a classroom and a synagogue were attacked in the same day, Senator Tuberville fanned the white-hot extremist flames by posting pictures of the burning Twin Towers next to New York City's first Muslim mayor eating dinner during Ramadan and calling him the enemy inside the gates. Call your representatives and demand they go on the record. Every member of Congress who stays silent through these bigoted attacks is permitting hate speech against their own constituents. We all own what happens next. We've emailed 6,500+ stories over 406 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/tuberville-muslim [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-world-cup [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar12 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/gerald-ford-fire [5] https://go.govbrief.today/va-mental-health [6] https://go.govbrief.today/feds-calif-ev [7] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis-april [8] https://go.govbrief.today/russsian-oil [9] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-jags [10] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-surveillance [11] https://go.govbrief.today/gender-affirm-ban [12] https://go.govbrief.today/odu-shooting [13] https://go.govbrief.today/michigan-synagogue [14] https://go.govbrief.today/beatty-kenctr-email [15] https://go.govbrief.today/cuba-war-powers [16] https://go.govbrief.today/john-solly [17] https://go.govbrief.today/usagm-new-ceo [18] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-crypto-dinner [19] https://go.govbrief.today/co-dems-ice Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
